name: Antenna
shortDescription: An antenna is a transducer that converts electrical signals to electromagnetic waves (and vice versa) for radio communication.
whatIsIt: An antenna is a transducer that converts electrical signals to electromagnetic waves (and vice versa) for radio communication.
whyExists: Antennas enable wireless transmission and reception of Radio Frequency (RF) energy.
whereUsed: Used in Wi-Fi, phones, radio, Global Positioning System (GPS), and Internet of Things (IoT).
